message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Sequence Diagram for Lexical Analysis and Syntax Checking

participant "File" as File
participant "LexicalAnalysisDriver" as Driver
participant "LexicalAnalysisJava" as Java
participant "JavaSyntaxLib" as Lib
participant "TypeCheck" as Type
participant "ColorCode" as Color
participant "ErrorCheck" as Error

File -> Driver: invokes
activate Driver
Driver -> Java: Calls
activate Java
Java -> Lib: Calls
activate Lib
Lib --> Java: 
deactivate Lib
Java -> Type: SyntaxTypeCheck()
activate Type
Type --> File: Return(TypeCheck)
deactivate Type
Java -> Color: SyntaxColorCheck()
activate Color
Color --> File: Return(ColorCode)
deactivate Color
Java -> Error: SyntaxErrorCheck()
activate Error

alt successful case
    Error --> File: Error Free
else Error Case
    Error --> File: Return Error Message
end

deactivate Error
deactivate Java
deactivate Driver

@enduml
```
